summary: High‑energy ’94 audience recording that captures a standout show despite a tad heavy crowd noise.
review: Both reviewers rate this performance as one of the best shows of 1994, praising its overall excitement and recommending it even if only an audience tape is available. The audience source is clear enough to enjoy, though the mix leans a bit toward crowd ambience. With five‑star ratings, the consensus is overwhelmingly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 5‑star reviews highlight an exceptional show and a generally good audience recording; limited detail keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice overall capture but slightly heavy on crowd noise, making some instrument details less distinct.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers rave about the performance as a top ’94 show, noting its energy and recommending it despite the lack of a soundboard source.
